name: 2018 Panini Contenders Football Cards – Rookie Ticket Short Print Runs

sections.title: Base Season Ticket
sections.odds: TICKET PARALLELS: Red Zone FOTL, Playoff #/175, Championship #/99, Cracked Ice #/24, Super Bowl 1/1, Printing Plates 1/1.

sections.title: Rookie Ticket RPS Autographs
sections.odds: SP/SSP cards noted. Refer to Short Print tab above for full print runs. · TICKET PARALLELS: Red Zone FOTL, Playoff #/99 or less, Championship #/49 or less, Cracked Ice #/24, Clear #/10, Super Bowl 1/1, Printing Plates 1/1.

sections.title: Rookie Ticket RPS Variation Autographs
sections.odds: 40 cards. ***Variation shows full-color logo on front and lists hometown after FROM: on back.*** · SP/SSP cards noted. Refer to Short Print tab above for full print runs. · TICKET PARALLELS: Red Zone FOTL, Playoff #/49 or less (No Hurst*), Championship #/25 or less, Cracked Ice #/24, Clear #/10, Super Bowl 1/1, Printing Plates 1/1 (No Guice*).
